stale_root_causes.description: None product option ($0) does not hide dependent sections — isSectionVisible() treats any product value (including None) as parent-has-value. Test assertions describe hide behavior that contradicts current implementation.
Admin UI field label is 'Active when section has value', not 'Depends On' as referenced in test steps. Steps will fail on element lookup.
Assertions describe OPTION 2 (validation error on save) but actual behavior is OPTION 3 (silent reject — circular value not persisted without warning).
Cross_Layer_Checks reference 'Installation section' which doesn't exist in CFG-022. Should be 'Tire Type'.
Assertions verify Add to Cart disabled/enabled states but don't explicitly reference the new configurableDisabled computed (isRequiredConfigurationComplete + configLoading) from PR#2225.
